title: Harry Bear Childrens Fleece Pyjamas, Stars Girls And Boys Pyjama Sets, Super Soft Kids Pyjamas
description: Drift off into dreamy nights with these Harry Bear fleece pjs for girls and boys, that every little star will adore. The girls and boys pyjama set is sprinkled with stars, making it the ultimate bedtime treasure. The matching top and bottoms on these girls pyjamas feature long sleeves, stretchy cuffs, and a comfy elasticated waistband for a cosy fit that lasts through every giggle and wiggle. Finish with a fleece bathrobe for a winter wardrobe finish. Crafted from ultra soft and cosy 100% polyester, these Harry Bear kids pjs set is designed to feel cosy and warm during the chilly winter season. Whether he’s zooming around before bedtime or she’s twirling around, before story time, this girls and boys pyjama set is the perfect mix of playful design and practical comfort. Ideal for gifting, these kids pyjamas boys will love, are a must-have addition to bedtime wardrobe. From boys star pyjamas to pyjamas girls will go starry eyed for, this set ticks every box. Looking for Harry Bear gifts or the perfect piece of Harry Bear merchandise? These girls and boys pjs make magical gifts ideal for Christmas and birthdays.
